examples: You're the nincompoop. The test was postponed anyway.
You naive, foolish, irresponsible nincompoop... I quake at the imbecility of it.
Executives at EADS are dismayed to see their future boss behave like a nincompoop.
The new characters include Brenda Fricker as a homeless woman who devotes herself to pigeons, and Tim Curry, Dana Ivey, and Rob Schneider as nincompoop hotel workers.
We have had some nincompoop frontbenchers and some expense-fiddling backbenchers, and even some who managed to qualify under both categories, but our political system is basically sound.
